name: Docsy
description: Docsy — Hugo theme from Google for technical documentation sites with navigation, versioning, and search support.

seo.title: Docsy — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Docsy: Docsy — Hugo theme from Google for technical documentation sites with navigation, versioning, and search support.

when_to_use: Hugo-based docs site for open-source project
Google-standard docs theme with integrated search
Multi-language documentation site for global OSS project
Self-hosted docs with Docsy as Gatsby/Docusaurus alternative

pros: Sensible IA conventions out of the box
review.verdict: A solid pick if your team is already on Hugo; otherwise Docusaurus or Mintlify are easier starts.
review.best_for: OSS and infra projects standardizing on Hugo for technical documentation
review.not_for: Teams unfamiliar with Hugo or wanting minimal-config doc sites
